## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New connector
- [ ] New domain / canonical schema
- [ ] Feature (profiling / matching / validation / transform / drift)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check canoniq tests` passes
- [ ] `mypy canoniq` passes
- [ ] `pytest --cov=canoniq` passes with coverage at or above 80%
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] No real personal/health/financial/educational data; examples are synthetic
- [ ] No secrets committed; source configs use `${ENV}` only
- [ ] No new network calls in the core package or tests
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (README, docs/, CHANGELOG)
